'''Seth Nikotemo''' (born 29 March 2004) is a New Zealand professional [[rugby league]] [[footballer]] who plays as a {{rlp|sr}} forward for [[Wakefield Trinity]] in the [[Super League]].

==Background==
Nikotemo was born in [[Wellington]], [[New Zealand]].

He attended [[Keebra Park State High School]] in [[Queensland, Australia]].<ref name="Titans 2023" />

Nikotemo played his junior [[rugby league]] for the [[Burleigh Bears]].<ref>{{cite web |url=https://www.titans.com.au/news/2022/05/12/future-titans-a-big-influence-in-nikotemos-queensland-opportunity/ |title=Future Titans a big influence in Nikotemo's Queensland opportunity |date=12 May 2022 |website=Gold Coast Titans |publisher=National Rugby League}}</ref> He was also selected in a number of Queensland youth sides as a junior.

==Career==
Nikotemo was signed by the [[Gold Coast Titans]] on a three-year contract starting in 2023.<ref name="Titans 2023">{{cite web |title=Titans sign local young gun after Kini upgrade |url=https://www.titans.com.au/news/2023/03/31/titans-sign-local-young-gun-after-kini-upgrade/ |date=31 March 2023 |website=Gold Coast Titans |publisher=National Rugby League |access-date=2 November 2025}}</ref> He spent two seasons on the club's development roster before moving on. 

He played for the [[Ipswich Jets]] in the [[Queensland Cup]] competition during the 2024 season.<ref name="Yorkshire Post 2024" /> 

In September 2024, Nikotemo signed a three-year contract with English club [[Wakefield Trinity]].<ref name="Yorkshire Post 2024">{{cite web |title='Perfect fit': Gold Coast Titans youngster Seth Nikotemo joins Wakefield Trinity |url=https://www.yorkshirepost.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/perfect-fit-gold-coast-titans-youngster-seth-nikotemo-joins-wakefield-trinity-4794469 |website=Yorkshire Post |access-date=2 November 2025 |date=24 September 2024}}</ref>

Nikotemo suffered a thumb injury during a pre-season game, which ruled him out for the beginning of the [[2025 Super League season]].<ref>{{cite web |title=Wakefield Trinity suffer double injury blow on eve of new season |url=https://www.yorkshirepost.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/wakefield-trinity-suffer-double-injury-blow-on-eve-of-new-season-4977579 |website=Yorkshire Post |access-date=2 November 2025 |date=5 February 2025}}</ref> He made his debut for Trinity against [[St Helens R.F.C.|St Helens]] in April 2025.<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.superleague.co.uk/match-centre/report/43451 |title=Super League Match Report |publisher=Super League |date=11 April 2025}}</ref>
